name: Research Report Generator
description: Research a topic thoroughly and produce a well-structured academic-style report

steps.title: Research the topic
steps.description: Conduct comprehensive research on the given topic. Gather information from multiple perspectives, identify key findings, notable experts, recent developments, and contrasting viewpoints.
steps.expected_output: Organized research notes with sources, key findings, statistics, and expert opinions

steps.title: Outline report structure
steps.description: Create a detailed report outline with sections, subsections, and key points to cover in each. Ensure logical flow from introduction through analysis to conclusion.
steps.expected_output: A hierarchical outline with section titles, key arguments, and supporting evidence placement

steps.title: Write the full report
steps.description: Write the complete report following the outline. Include an executive summary, introduction, body sections with analysis, conclusion, and references. Use clear academic prose.
steps.expected_output: A complete markdown report with all sections, proper citations, and professional formatting

steps.title: Review and edit
steps.description: Review the report for accuracy, coherence, grammar, and completeness. Check that claims are supported, arguments are logical, and the writing is clear and engaging.
steps.expected_output: An edited version of the report with tracked changes and a summary of improvements made
